name: io.github.Mameta29/japan-data-mcp
title: Japan Data MCP
description: 28 tools for Japanese data: address, furigana, transit, Diet, holidays, weather, corporate registry & KYB reports

environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key of a USDC-funded wallet used to pay per-call x402 fees. Optional: without it the server starts and lists all tools, but paid tool calls return a 'payments disabled' error.
